title: Tunisian Cardamom Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with chicken, cardamom, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: giant cardamom pods
ingredients.notes: crush the pods to release the seeds

instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cardamom pods, spice blend, broth, honey, and lemon juice.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
